prompt: An infinite dark library stretching endlessly in all directions, photographed from a low dramatic angle. The vast majority of shelves — perhaps 90 percent — are completely empty: bare wood, crumbling edges, thick dust, broken boards, cobwebs, and deep shadow. In the center of the frame, a small island of shelves holds ancient glowing books, radiating a warm amber and gold light. The glow is fragile, small, surrounded by overwhelming darkness and emptiness. The floor is stone, cracked. The ceiling is lost in shadow. The mood is profound grief and irreversible loss. Hyper-detailed, cinematic, fine art photography style, shallow depth of field, volumetric light rays through dust. No text, no labels, no numbers, no people, no charts.
dataset_name: UNESCO Atlas of the World's Languages in Danger
insight: Over 2,900 of Earth's ~7,000 languages are endangered; one disappears every two weeks, taking irreplaceable ways of understanding the world with it.
